reason: GT-bhsa-jc carries a FABRICATED verbatim quote (L1 byte-verbatim provenance failure), and node 1.3.1 LEANS ON it: the proof invokes 'V a JB algebra GT-bhsa-jc' to license the JB norm axiom ||z^2||=||z||^2 (GT-jb-axiom-sq applies only because V is a JB algebra). The external GT-bhsa-jc asserts VERBATIM: 'If A is a $C^*$ algebra then $A_{sa}$ with the Jordan product $a \circ b = \frac{1}{2}(ab+ba)$ is a JB algebra' attributed to refs/hos/joa-m.md:2300 (3.1.2). That string is NOT byte-present in the local source. Independently re-verified by grep -F: (i) the full claimed string returns exit 1 (no match); (ii) 'grep -nF "with the Jordan product" joa-m.md' returns exit 1 (zero hits); (iii) the ACTUAL 3.1.2 at line 2300 reads 'Let H be a complex Hilbert space and B(H) the algebra of all bounded linear operators on H. Let B(H)_sa denote the special Jordan algebra of all self-adjoint operators in B(H) equipped with the operator norm. By a JC algebra we shall mean any norm-closed Jordan subalgebra of B(H)_sa.' -- it contains NEITHER the conditional 'If A is a C* algebra then A_sa ... is a JB algebra' NOR the product formula a o b=(1/2)(ab+ba). Those facts live at DIFFERENT loci: the product formula a o b=(1/2)(ab+ba) at lines 812 and 1575 (2.7.1, H_n(R)); 'each JC algebra is a JB algebra' at line 2320 (via 1.3.2). Doctrine is byte-verbatim string-match to local refs/ only: a VERBATIM: quote that does not string-match cannot be passed off as byte-verified, even though the underlying math fact (B(H)_sa is a unital JB algebra with order unit 1, product (ab+ba)/2) is TRUE and re-sourceable. FIX: re-source GT-bhsa-jc to its true verbatim loci -- compose 3.1.2 (line 2300, B(H)_sa as special Jordan algebra / JC def) + line 2320 'each JC algebra is a JB algebra' + line 812 or 2.7.1 line 1575 for a o b=(1/2)(ab+ba) -- rather than asserting a single fabricated quote. NOTE on the rest of 1.3.1, which is otherwise AIRTIGHT: the math is fully correct and uses NO ||Phi||=1 (the route is z^2>=0 + omega positive => omega(z^2)>=0, plus state bound |omega(z^2)|<=||z^2||, delta-free); the constant is 1 (dimension-free, universal); GT-state-bounded (line 378, |rho(a)|<=||a|| for a state), GT-jb-axiom-sq (lines 2314-2316, ||a^2||=||a||^2) and GT-jb-orderunit-3310 (line 2552, V an order unit space, order unit 1) ALL re-grepped byte-verbatim and genuinely support their uses. The SOLE defect is the fabricated GT-bhsa-jc verbatim string (same root cause already flagged on node 1.1's open challenge ch-990581934da922eb); since GT-bhsa-jc is load-bearing for 1.3.1 (no JB-algebra status => no ||z^2||=||z||^2), 1.3.1 inherits the provenance failure and cannot be validated until GT-bhsa-jc is honestly re-sourced.
